content: MSP outage alert: Kaseya / Datto RMM agent installs failing due to certificate errors; official status remains investigating.

text.text:
*Current Issue*
Datto RMM reports an active incident where the RMM agent cannot be installed because of certificate errors across all listed platforms.

fields.text:
*Status*
Investigating; latest official update posted 2026-04-02 17:09 EDT saying the team is continuing to investigate.

*Impact*
MSP technicians may be unable to deploy new Datto RMM agents or complete onboarding/redeployment work across EU, US, and APAC platforms.

text.text:
*Response*
• Pause non-urgent Datto RMM agent rollout/reinstall work and flag onboarding/rebuild tasks that depend on fresh agent installs.
• Check the incident page before retrying installs, and use alternate monitoring/remote-access coverage for newly provisioned endpoints until Kaseya posts a fix.
